title: docs: update API Reference docs
body:
I forgot to update the docs here when I reworked the build process. Link to the new location and explain how users can download the file, see https://github.com/podman-container-tools/podman/discussions/29035

Now because the file is served on the same domain there should also be no longer any issue with CORS so remove the old picture.

Fixes: c2ffe88ce0 ("build the swagger.yml on readthedocs")
